expectations.text: Prioritizes audience fit / relevance over raw follower count
expectations.evidence: Niche/audience fit and engagement over follower count.

expectations.text: Raises vetting for authentic engagement (real engagement, not bought audience) and/or micro vs mega trade-off
expectations.evidence: Vetting for authentic engagement; micro/nano over macro for a new brand.

expectations.text: Recommends a brief that gives a core message + must-haves while leaving the creator's authentic voice intact
expectations.evidence: One-page brief loose enough to keep authentic voice.

expectations.text: States that paid/gifted partnerships must be clearly disclosed (#ad / FTC) — not optional
expectations.evidence: FTC #ad/paid-partnership disclosure required on every paid/gifted post.

expectations.text: Ties measurement to the goal (awareness vs direct response) with per-partner tracking
expectations.evidence: Unique code+link per creator; goal-based metrics; re-sign top performers.
